title: trollius palmatus
intro: Trollius palmatus, also known as globeflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. Consuming Trollius palmatus has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Trollius palmatus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
